channel.title: FFXIV on ungehoBlog
channel.description: Recent content in FFXIV on ungehoBlog

item.title: Heavyweight Savage Floor 4 Splatoon Layout
item.description: An AI-translated English edition of the original memo for the Arcadion Savage Heavyweight Floor 4 Splatoon layout.
